title: Linear Algebra for Signals
description: Eigendecomposition of symmetric matrices, quadratic forms, and positive semi-definiteness — the geometry behind every covariance matrix you'll meet later in this course.
objectives: Define eigenvectors and eigenvalues, and state the spectral theorem's guarantee for real symmetric matrices
Compute quadratic forms and determine positive semi-definiteness from a matrix's eigenvalues
Interpret a covariance matrix's eigenvectors and eigenvalues as the axes and spread of its geometric ellipse
Eigendecompose a small sample covariance matrix by hand and interpret the result
